text: Melanie Murk. We expect the food industry to grow by 1 percent in volume by 2025. Domestic demand is increasing and exports are also increasing this year. We expect stabilization before 2026. The unpredictability, especially in international supply chains, is increasing.

metadata.source_title: Volume growth is back in the food industry

text: We expect the food industry to grow by 1 percent in volume by 2025. Domestic demand is increasing and exports are also increasing this year. We expect stabilization before 2026. The unpredictability, especially in international supply chains, is increasing.
